description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is surrounded by meticulously arranged hedges and trees, providing a sense of privacy and greenery. The main structure is complemented by a smaller, detached building, possibly a garage or utility shed, located near the front. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The entryway is defined by a central path flanked by symmetrical landscaping, leading to a recessed doorway. The property is bordered by a long hedge fence, enhancing its urban residential character.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, surrounded by manicured hedges, trees, and a detached utility structure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical hedges, and the central path leading to the doorway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the detached utility building, rear landscaping, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional greenery, and the arrangement of windows and hedges.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the utility building, side landscaping, and the continuation of the hedge fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Central recessed entry with a straight path, flanked by hedges and minimal decorative elements.
